utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh , and then Monica joked that she would not go out with a guy like Chandler ...

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: ... and he could not let it go , and ... I do not really know what happened with that either .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And then Ross new girlfriend , Bonnie , shows up and Rachel convinced her to save her head .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: And then Ross and Rachel kiss , and now Ross has to choose between Rachel and the bald girl and I do not know what happened there either ...

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You know what , hold on , let me go get Chandler .
